title: Add debug logging to transmission start methods
description: Modify start_transmission and _handle_tx_start_delayed methods in python/src/lichen/sim/simulation.py to add debug logging with: sim_id, node_id, payload_len, node_state, queue_size, jitter_enabled, current_time when transmission starts or is delayed.
close_reason: Added structured debug logs to start_transmission() and _handle_tx_start_delayed() with sim_id/node_id/payload_len/node_state/queue_size/jitter_enabled/current_time; updated lr1110_lora_send tx start in PHY; verified with pytest test_simulation_logging.py (3/3 passed)
